response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song as 'Blue World' based on the on-screen title text. 2. Performed a search to identify the artist (Shoji Meguro) and the performer (Nerissa Ravencroft). 3. Located the full English lyrics for 'Blue World' by Nerissa Ravencroft. 4. Mapped the scenes: 00:00-04:27 is the musical performance, 04:27-05:00 is post-performance chatter.
response.global_summary: The video features a performance of 'Blue World' by Nerissa Ravencroft and another Hololive VTuber, followed by a short post-performance conversation. The song is in English.

scenes.description: The song 'Blue World' is performed by Nerissa Ravencroft and a second VTuber (likely another Hololive member). The stage is surrounded by large blue crystals.
scenes.performer_in_video: Nerissa Ravencroft and a second VTuber
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
No world
Nowhere for me to go
Lost and lonely
Yeah, it's only me
Burnt out like candlelight
Left blazing through the night
Melting slowly
Until nothing else is left of me

Colored in shades of gray
Watching the days pass in front of me
Longing to find a way
I can fly away
I'm drifting through this blue blue world

It's always been clear to me
How cruel the world can be
My shadow's the only one beside me
No love to call my own
No notice on my phone
Sunk in silence
Has engulfed the very life I lead

Colored in shades of gray
Watching the days pass in front of me
Longing to find a way
I can fly away
I'm drifting through this blue blue world

Memories I wish would stay
Always fade away
I'm looking in this blue blue world

Though my heart is torn
And my weary wings are worn
Just tonight
Can I dream
Of a better life
With happiness inside?

Colored in shades of gray
Watching my life pass in front of me
Maybe it's not too late
If I can't escape
I'll have to make my own way
Colored in shades of gray

Having it in hand
I can make a change
I'll try to find the strength
Take a breath and feign
Bring color to this blue blue world
